title: ANIMAL SHELTER AND ADOPTION SERVICES - 211info
text: COLUMBIA HUMANE SOCIETY ANIMAL SHELTER AND ADOPTION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an opportunity to adopt animals, animal shelter services, and animal surrender.This is a no-kill shelter. 2084 Oregon Street Saint Helens, OR 97051 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday/Saturday/Sunday noon-5pm Email (503) 397-4353 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 397-4353 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Appointment only FEES: Cat adoption fee: $150 includes spay/neuter services, vaccines, microchip, leukemia test, de-wormer, and flea treatment while at the shelter Dog adoption fee: $250-$400 includes spay/neuter services, vaccines, microchip, heartworm test, de-wormer, and flea treatment while at the shelter DOCUMENTS: Vaccination records preferred at time of surrender AREA SERVED: Columbia County Services: Animal Adoption Animal Shelters If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. COLUMBIA HUMANE SOCIETY
